suite.name: Shopping

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Set Selenium Implicit Wait
kw.doc: Sets the implicit wait value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Set Selenium Page Load Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the page load timeout value used by Selenium.

kw.name: Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.

kw.name: Generate Yopmail Email
kw.doc: Generate a unique random email address using the @yopmail.com domain.

kw.name: Generate Random Name
kw.doc: Return a random first name from a predefined list.

kw.name: Generate Random Last Name
kw.doc: Return a random last name from a predefined list.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Generated credentials — Email: testuser_urnzmllm2580@yopmail.com | Name: Edward Johnson
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Verify Signup Redirected To Login Page
Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Signup successful — redirected to login page
kw.arg: Signup successful — redirected to login page
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Location Contains
kw.doc: Waits until the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Get Location
kw.doc: Returns the current browser window URL.

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.name: TC-04: Filter Products By Category And Checkout With Cash On Delivery

kw.name: Given I Am On The All Products Page
Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Wait For Condition
kw.doc: Waits until ``condition`` is true or ``timeout`` expires.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: When I Apply The Category Filter
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Select From List By Label
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'css:[data-testid='all-products-category-select']' by label All.

kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: var setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(window.HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set;setter.call(arguments[0], arguments[1]);arguments[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true}));arguments[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); By using arguments: '<selenium.webdriver.remote.webelement.WebElement (session="cd723be18dd0f1ee5bcd68763d3f3a35", element="f.559C2C8B48EB60F15A02016318FF7430.d.D9BC1AC0708600311716AA942D582D52.e.310")>' and 'Edward'

kw.name: Should Not Contain
kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` contains ``item`` one or more times.

kw.msg: Keyword 'Checkout URL Should Have Changed' failed after retrying for 30 seconds. The last error was: 'https://storedemo.testdino.com/checkout' contains '/checkout'
kw.doc: Runs the specified keyword and retries if it fails.
kw.status: Keyword 'Checkout URL Should Have Changed' failed after retrying for 30 seconds. The last error was: 'https://storedemo.testdino.com/checkout' contains '/checkout'

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Order placed successfully — left the checkout page
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Fail
kw.msg: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds
kw.arg: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
kw.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

branch.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

if.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: TC-04 PASSED — Order placed for product: ${SELECTED_PRODUCT_NAME}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

kw.name: Run Keyword If Test Failed
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.

test.doc:
Scenario: A logged-in user applies a category filter, adds the first result to the cart, and completes checkout using Cash on Delivery.
Given I am on the All Products page When I open the filter panel and select the "Uncategorized" category And I add the first product to the cart And I navigate to the cart and proceed to checkout And I fill in the shipping address and save it And I select Cash on Delivery as the payment method And I place the order Then the order is confirmed
test.status: Order failed — browser is still on the checkout page after 30 seconds

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

suite.doc:
Feature: Product Browsing, Filtering, and Checkout
As a logged-in user of TestDino Store I want to browse products, apply a category filter, and complete a purchase So that I can validate the end-to-end shopping flow
Precondition : An authenticated session (handled by Suite Setup) Postcondition: An order has been placed via Cash on Delivery
